items.title: Zelenskyy thanks UK for intercepting Russian shadow fleet oil tanker after armed forces board vessel - as it happened
items.standfirst: Keir Starmer said British armed forces intercepted a Russian shadow fleet vessel in the early hours of Sunday morningBritish armed forces intercept Russian shadow fleet oil tanker in ChannelUkrainian president Volodymyr Zelenskyy has thanked the UK for intercepting a Russian shadow fleet oil tanker in the English Channel, describing it as an “important step”.“It was Russia’s hubris, fuelled by high oil and gas revenues, that paved the way for this war, and every decision by partners that deprives Russia of money also limits the war itself” he wrote in a post on X, in which he personally thanked the British prime minister, Keir Starmer, and “all Britons”. Continue reading...

items.title: U.K. forces intercept a Russian shadow fleet oil tanker in English Channel
items.standfirst: British forces intercepted a Russian shadow fleet oil tanker on Sunday morning, its Ministry of Defence said, in the latest effort to disrupt Moscow’s sanctions-evasion network.

items.title: UK intercepts oil tanker from Russia's shadow fleet in English Channel
items.standfirst: British forces intercepted a UK-sanctioned oil tanker accused of belonging to what has been dubbed Russia's "shadow fleet" in the English Channel on Sunday, in what the country’s defence ministry called "the first UK-led operation of its kind".
items.content: British forces intercepted a UK-sanctioned oil tanker accused of belonging to what has been dubbed Russia's "shadow fleet" in the English Channel on Sunday, in what the country’s defence ministry called "the first UK-led operation of its kind".

clusters.title: US: New York Knicks win first NBA championship since 1973
clusters.neutral_headline: New York Knicks Win NBA Championship

items.title: US: New York Knicks win first NBA championship since 1973
items.standfirst: The New York Knicks are champions of the NBA for the first time since 1973, beating the San Antonio Spurs in five games for this title. The clincher came Saturday night in a 94-90 victory, the Knicks' fourth comeback win of the series.
items.content: The New York Knicks are champions of the NBA for the first time since 1973, beating the San Antonio Spurs in five games for this title. The clincher came Saturday night in a 94-90 victory, the Knicks' fourth comeback win of the series.

items.title: The US sporting triumph that is overshadowing the World Cup
items.standfirst: The football World Cup has taken a back seat in New York as the Knicks win their first NBA title in 53 years.
items.content: The football World Cup has taken a back seat in New York as the Knicks win their first NBA title in 53 years.

items.title: Knicks capture first NBA title in 53 years
items.standfirst: The New York Knicks captured their first NBA championship since 1973 with a 94-90 win over the San Antonio Spurs in Game 5 of the NBA Finals on Saturday night.
items.content: The New York Knicks captured their first NBA championship since 1973 with a 94-90 win over the San Antonio Spurs in Game 5 of the NBA Finals on Saturday night.

items.title: New York Knicks beat Spurs to claim first NBA title in 53 years
New York Knicks beat Spurs to claim first NBA title in 53 years
items.standfirst: Jalen Brunson scored 45 points as the New York Knicks beat the San Antonio Spurs 94-90 on Saturday to clinch their first NBA championship in 53 years. The Knicks sealed the best-of-seven NBA Finals 4-1, taking down French star Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs on their home court to capture their first title since 1973.
items.content: Jalen Brunson scored 45 points as the New York Knicks beat the San Antonio Spurs 94-90 on Saturday to clinch their first NBA championship in 53 years. The Knicks sealed the best-of-seven NBA Finals 4-1, taking down French star Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs on their home court to capture their first title since 1973.

items.content: The New York Knicks ended their championship drought on Saturday, winning the best-of-seven NBA Finals series 4-1.

items.title: Switzerland: After rapid population growth, right-wing party supports cap vote
items.standfirst: Swiss voters will decide the fate of a divisive anti-immigration proposal on Sunday to cap the country's population, and another referendum on restricting access to conscientious objection to military service. France 24's John Zarocostas tells us more.

items.title: Swiss cast ballots on right-wing's bid to cap country's population at 10 million
items.standfirst: Voters in Switzerland are casting final ballots Sunday on an initiative championed by the top right-wing party to cap the rich Alpine country's population at 10 million.
items.content: Voters in Switzerland are casting final ballots Sunday on an initiative championed by the top right-wing party to cap the rich Alpine country's population at 10 million.

items.title: Switzerland rejects right-wing bid to cap country’s population
items.standfirst: A 'yes' vote would have forced the government to restrict asylum, residency permits, and scrap EU deal on free movement.
items.content: A 'yes' vote would have forced the government to restrict asylum, residency permits, and scrap EU deal on free movement.

items.title: Swiss voters set to reject proposed 10 million population cap in referendum
items.standfirst: A majority of Swiss voters seem to have rejected a divisive anti-immigration referendum on Sunday that proposed capping the country’s population at 10 million people, according to projections released after the polls closed.
items.content: A majority of Swiss voters seem to have rejected a divisive anti-immigration referendum on Sunday that proposed capping the country’s population at 10 million people, according to projections released after the polls closed.

items.title: Swiss wait to hear result of ballot on capping population at 10 million
items.standfirst: The far-right proposal would require the government to put restrictions in place to limit the population by 2050 A national ballot on an unprecedented far-right proposal to limit Switzerland’s population to 10 million concludes this weekend, amid warnings of devastating consequences for the country’s economy if voters back the initiative.A “yes” vote would require the Swiss government to take steps to cap the population at 10 million by 2050, enacting tough restrictions on family reunification, residency permits and asylum if the number reaches 9.5 million before that date. Continue reading...
items.content: The far-right proposal would require the government to put restrictions in place to limit the population by 2050 A national ballot on an unprecedented far-right proposal to limit Switzerland’s population to 10 million concludes this weekend, amid warnings of devastating consequences for the country’s economy if voters back the initiative.A “yes” vote would require the Swiss government to take steps to cap the population at 10 million by 2050, enacting tough restrictions on family reunification, residency permits and asylum if the number reaches 9.5 million before that date. Continue reading...

ai_summary: Swiss voters rejected a proposal to cap the population
The proposal aimed to limit the population to 10 million
Voters decided against restricting asylum and residency
The result was based on early projections and vote counts
The far-right proposal was opposed by many voters

items.standfirst: President says Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores killed in ‘swift and lethal’ military strike with help from VenezuelaThe US military has killed a leader in the Venezuelan street gang Tren de Aragua, Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, with the help of Venezuela, Donald Trump announced on Friday.“At my direction, the United States Southern Command delivered a swift and lethal kinetic strike to successfully execute Niño Guerrero, the infamous leader of Tren De Aragua, one of the most bloodthirsty Terrorist Organizations on Planet Earth,” Trump wrote on Truth Social. clusters.neutral_headline: Protests Against Luxury Resorts in Albania

items.title: Anger over planned luxury resorts in Albania, including one linked to Trump's son-in-law
items.standfirst: Around 200 protesters have torn down fencing surrounding a controversial luxury development in Albania, as demonstrations continue over another planned resort linked ​to Donald Trump's son-in-law, Jared Kushner.
items.content: Around 200 protesters have torn down fencing surrounding a controversial luxury development in Albania, as demonstrations continue over another planned resort linked ​to Donald Trump's son-in-law, Jared Kushner.

items.title: Albanians protest against another luxury development on Adriatic coast
items.standfirst: Fencing removed at environmentally sensitive site, mirroring protests against Trump son-in-law’s projectAbout 200 protesters on Saturday tore down metal and razor-wire fences surrounding a luxury development site on Albania’s Adriatic coast, in another sign of growing anger against construction in environmentally sensitive areas.Albanians have been protesting for weeks against a planned luxury resort backed by a company linked to Jared Kushner, the son-in-law of Donald Trump, near Vlora, which is famed for its flamingos and a turtle nesting site. Continue reading...

clusters.title: US justice department approves $111bn merger of Paramount and Warner Bros Discovery

items.title: US justice department approves $111bn merger of Paramount and Warner Bros Discovery
items.standfirst: Deal still under UK scrutiny with new investigation, and could face lawsuit from state attorneys generalDonald Trump’s Department of Justice has decided to approve the $111bn merger of Paramount Skydance, controlled by the Ellison family, and Warner Bros Discovery, the parent company of networks like CNN and HBO.The deal was approved by the justice department’s anti-trust division after months of review, and despite the concerns of many people in the entertainment and media industries who believe it will hurt competition by reducing the number of film studios and – most likely – merging two news networks, Paramount’s CBS News and CNN. Continue reading...
items.content: Deal still under UK scrutiny with new investigation, and could face lawsuit from state attorneys generalDonald Trump’s Department of Justice has decided to approve the $111bn merger of Paramount Skydance, controlled by the Ellison family, and Warner Bros Discovery, the parent company of networks like CNN and HBO.The deal was approved by the justice department’s anti-trust division after months of review, and despite the concerns of many people in the entertainment and media industries who believe it will hurt competition by reducing the number of film studios and – most likely – merging two news networks, Paramount’s CBS News and CNN. Continue reading...

items.title: Paramount’s Deal for Warner Bros. Is Cleared by US DOJ
items.standfirst: The US Justice Department has closed an antitrust probe into Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion purchase of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., saying the deal “is not likely” to hurt consumers or competition in the film and television industry.
items.content: The US Justice Department has closed an antitrust probe into Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion purchase of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., saying the deal “is not likely” to hurt consumers or competition in the film and television industry.

ai_summary: The US Justice Department approved a $111bn merger
The merger is between Paramount and Warner Bros Discovery
The deal is still under UK scrutiny
The merger may face a lawsuit from state attorneys
The approval is seen as a significant development
